turns.content: Can you list the S3 buckets in the production account?

Here's `aws s3 ls` from the production account:

```
2026-01-04 12:14:32 strata-cf-logs-archive
2026-01-04 12:14:32 strata-glue-staging
2026-04-12 09:02:17 strata-releases-prod
2026-04-22 16:33:49 strata-tf-state-prod
2026-05-01 11:51:08 strata-web-static-assets
```

strata-releases-prod is the one that serves licensed release tarballs to strata-worker; the others are infra-internal.
